title: CoAP forward proxy resource for gateway
description: Add a CoAP forward proxy to resources.py so that a local client can reach any mesh node through the gateway. A client sends a request to coap://[gateway]/proxy with a Proxy-Uri option pointing at a remote mesh node (e.g. coap://[fd00::2]/status). The gateway CoAP server forwards the request into the mesh via NodeChannel and returns the response. Spec: RFC 7252 §5.7 (forward proxy). This is the key feature that lets phone/desktop apps address deep mesh nodes without knowing the full routing table.
acceptance_criteria: A GET to /proxy with Proxy-Uri reaches the target node and returns its response; non-existent targets return 5.02; the proxy does not alter the payload
close_reason: ProxyResource implemented, build_site wired, 10 tests pass
